mnemonics.title: Solar Cell Types Efficiency
mnemonics.content: MPS: Monocrystalline (Most efficient) → Polycrystalline (Standard) → Thin-film (Sluggish efficiency)

acronyms.usage: Refers to technology that converts sunlight into electricity
Solar thermal technology using mirrors to focus sunlight
Type of electricity used in homes, converted from solar DC
Electricity produced by solar panels before conversion
Unit of energy measurement for solar generation and consumption

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a sunflower tracking the Sun - panels should be angled equal to the location's latitude for optimal year-round capture
Think of photons (sunlight particles) as balls hitting electrons in a semiconductor 'ball pit', knocking electrons loose to create current flow
Picture a heat map where darker red areas = more sunlight hours, similar to weather temperature maps but showing solar potential

analogies.analogy: Like a water tank that stores water during rainy days for use during dry periods - stores excess solar energy for later use
Like a translator converting one language (DC) to another (AC) that appliances understand
Like adjustable sunglasses that tilt to always face the brightest light source for maximum clarity
